# North West Design

> Custom apparel and promotional production in Clarkston, WA. Twenty-five years in one zip code. Screen printing, embroidery, signage, stickers, DTF, engraving, and graphic design.

North West Design is a local print and embroidery shop serving the Lewis-Clark Valley (Clarkston, WA and Lewiston, ID). The shop handles orders from a few shirts for a family reunion to full company runs of branded apparel, hats, signage, and promotional goods. Pricing is by quote — work is custom, so there's no e-commerce cart. Customers typically request a quote, get a turnaround estimate, and pay online by card or eCheck.

## Services

- Screen printing — tees, hoodies, sweatshirts, event apparel
- Embroidery — hats, jackets, polos, full-back designs
- Direct-to-Film (DTF) printing — full-color prints on dark or light garments
- Stickers — die-cut, custom shapes, printed runs
- Signage and banners — vinyl, retractable, large format
- Engraving — promotional and award pieces
- Graphic design — logo and layout work to support production

## Sections

- [Services](https://nwtees.com/#services): Overview of what the shop produces.
- [Recent Work](https://nwtees.com/#work): Gallery of recent custom orders — embroidered hats, screen-printed tees, signage, stickers, koozies, totes.
- [About / Who We Are](https://nwtees.com/#about): Twenty-five years in one zip code; local production, quick turnaround.
- [Contact](https://nwtees.com/#contact): Phone, email, shop address, online bill pay, social.

## Contact

- Shop: 1142 16th Ave, Ste A, Clarkston, WA 99403 (just off Fleshman Way)
- Pay an invoice online: [echelon.hyfin.app/7AW5JPK25CXM](https://echelon.hyfin.app/7AW5JPK25CXM) — card or eCheck

## Optional

- Quotes are requested through the form on the contact section of the homepage or by phone/email.
- Service area: primarily the Lewis-Clark Valley (Clarkston, WA and Lewiston, ID), with shipping available for out-of-area customers.
- No published price list — every order is custom, so pricing is by quote.
